title: Marketing Manager:in (w/m/d)
summary: Generalist marketing manager role at a hardware/exoskeleton startup requiring content creation, social media, SEO/SEA and graphic design; candidate's analytical and B2B marketing background partially fits but lacks creative/content tools and German C1.
key_requirements: Abgeschlossene Ausbildung oder Studium in Marketing, Kommunikation oder Medien
Praktische Erfahrung in Content-Erstellung und redaktioneller Arbeit
Verständnis von Analyse-Tools wie Google Analytics
Sicherer Umgang mit CMS und Social-Media-Plattformen
Grundkenntnisse in Grafikbearbeitung (Adobe Creative Suite, Canva)
matched_skills: Master of Public Relations and Advertising – directly relevant degree
Master of Management & Entrepreneurship – additional qualification
B2B lead generation and new customer acquisition experience
Social media channel experience (LinkedIn, digital channels)
Campaign planning and execution (trade fairs, product launches)
Cross-functional coordination with internal teams and external partners
missing_skills: Google Analytics or similar web analytics tool (candidate uses Power BI / Qlik / Looker, not GA)
Adobe Creative Suite / Canva graphic design
Newsletter / blog content creation and editorial workflow
recommended_emphasis: Lead with PR & Advertising master's degree as direct match for marketing communications role
Highlight KOL campaign tracking and audience engagement analytics as content performance experience
Showcase post-event performance reports and insight-to-action reporting as content/editorial analogue
Emphasise B2B lead generation work (trade fair lead funnels, pipeline conversion) for Leadgenerierung requirement
Note multi-channel campaign coordination experience across EMEA/APAC as evidence of marketing breadth
language_requirement: Deutsch und Englisch mind. C1 – candidate's German B1+ is below requirement
location_notes: Hamburg-Wilhelmsburg with weekly office presence required + Homeoffice – candidate in Lüneburg, commute feasible
risk_flags: German language level (B1+) below required C1 – significant gap
No hands-on content creation / copywriting / editorial work evidenced
No graphic design tool experience (Canva, Adobe) listed
No CMS or website management experience mentioned
Role is generalist creative + analytical; CV skews heavily analytical
